name: Suspicious Attachment from New Account Shows Similarity to Other Verified Malicious Attachments Detected by Retro Scan
description: Suspicious attachments sent from new email accounts that are similar to multiple, verified malicious email attachments may indicate additional attack attempts. [Delayed alert: Batch process detection]

rules.name: Suspicious Attachment from New Account Shows Similarity to Other Verified Malicious Attachments Detected by Retro Scan

author: Ray C Lin
